deploy.meta.title: Deploy Contratti - BiuBiu Tools
deploy.meta.description: Esegui il deploy di contratti Foundry tramite CREATE2 con indirizzi deterministici. Firma con passkey, verifica dei contratti e cronologia dei deploy.
deploy.title: Deploy Contratti
deploy.subtitle: Deploy deterministico CREATE2 con firma tramite passkey
deploy.server.title: Server Foundry
deploy.server.hint: Esegui nella directory del tuo progetto Foundry:
deploy.account.title: Account
deploy.account.notLoggedIn: Accedi con passkey per eseguire il deploy
deploy.contract.title: Contratto
deploy.contract.noContracts: Nessun contratto trovato. Compila prima il progetto.
deploy.chain.title: Chain di destinazione
deploy.chain.customRpc: Oppure incolla un URL RPC personalizzato…
deploy.chain.rpcEndpointError: Errore dell'endpoint RPC — seleziona un altro RPC o inseriscine uno personalizzato
deploy.create2.alreadyDeployed: Contratto già distribuito a questo indirizzo
deploy.action.cancelHint: Taking too long? Stop waiting and start over.
deploy.gas.title: Impostazioni gas
deploy.qr.title: Indirizzo del wallet
deploy.verify.title: Verifica contratto
deploy.log.title: Log
deploy.history.title: Cronologia dei deploy
deploy.history.clearConfirm: Cancellare tutta la cronologia dei deploy?
deploy.error.noChain: Seleziona prima una chain di destinazione
deploy.error.invalidSalt: Il salt deve essere di 66 caratteri (32 byte esadecimali)
deploy.error.gasInsufficient: Gas insufficiente. Deposita token nativi nel tuo wallet sulla chain di destinazione.
deploy.connect.heading: Get set up
deploy.connect.intro: Two quick things before your first deploy.
deploy.connect.serverDesc: Compiles your contracts and runs verification. Start it in your Foundry project folder:
deploy.connect.walletDesc: Signs the deployment with your passkey — no seed phrase, no extension.
deploy.contract.heading: Choose a contract
deploy.contract.intro: Pick a compiled contract and fill in its constructor.
deploy.contract.noArgs: This contract has no constructor arguments — nothing to fill in.
deploy.contract.noBytecode: No deployable bytecode — this looks like an interface or abstract contract.
deploy.network.heading: Pick the target chain
deploy.network.intro: Only chains with full passkey-wallet support are listed. The fastest RPC is selected automatically.
deploy.review.heading: Review & deploy
deploy.review.intro: Thanks to CREATE2, your contract gets the same address on every chain.
deploy.help.predicted: This is the exact address your contract will get — identical on every supported chain.
deploy.help.salt: The salt determines the address. Keep the default unless you want a specific vanity address.
deploy.verify.heading: Verify on the explorer
deploy.verify.intro: Publish your source so anyone can read and trust the deployed contract.
deploy.gate.server: Connect the build server to continue
deploy.gate.wallet: Sign in with your passkey to continue
deploy.gate.notReady: This chain isn't ready yet — check the network status
deploy.gate.deployed: A contract already exists at this address — verify its source below
deploy.ready.fixHint: Missing on-chain contracts — deploy them (including the CREATE2 proxy) in one step on the network-setup page.
deploy.ready.hardHint: P256 verification (RIP-7212) is a chain-level capability that can’t be deployed — so passkey deployment isn’t possible on this chain yet.
deploy.ready.gasHint: Fund the gas account (your wallet address) with native tokens on this chain — that’s the last step.
